last_angles: Identity — you already have the strategy; the gap is execution, not knowledge
Fear — 'control' over every trade is the illusion that keeps costing you money
Educational — execution variance is the real reason intermediate traders underperform their backtests
Curiosity — in a news-heavy week (NFP, JOLTS, Beige Book, Powell), manual traders lose because they hesitate, not because their analysis is wrong
Social proof — Marcos: solid backtest, 6 months of underperformance, then consistent gains after automating the same strategy
Brand narrative — JessTrading was built for traders who already know what to do but can't execute consistently
Contrast — your strategy manually executed vs. bot-executed: same edge, completely different outcomes
